message:
fix(core): skip eager rewrite of correlated scalar subqueries

Correlated scalar subqueries (Expr::Subquery) were eagerly evaluated
during rewrite_in_expr without outer row context, producing NULL and
breaking WHERE/SELECT list usage. Add is_correlated_subquery() check
matching the existing Expr::Exists pattern so they survive into VDBE
codegen's emit_scalar_subquery which handles them correctly per-row.

Also add nix "process"+"signal" features needed for Pid in lifecycle.rs,
and remove #[ignore] from 3 now-passing conformance tests (031, 058).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -152,7 +152,7 @@ blake3 = "1.5"
 crossbeam-epoch = "0.9"
 crossbeam-deque = "0.8"
 sha2 = "0.10"
-nix = { version = "0.29", default-features = false, features = ["fs", "socket", "uio", "user"] }
+nix = { version = "0.29", default-features = false, features = ["fs", "process", "signal", "socket", "uio", "user"] }
 libc = "0.2"
 chacha20poly1305 = "0.10"
 argon2 = "0.5"
